document.title: Margin — Lecture Notes
brand.subtitle: Lecture workspace
library.empty: Your imported lectures will appear here.
reader.empty_heading:
Your lecture on one side.
Your thinking on the other.
reader.empty_description: Open a PDF or PowerPoint. Every memo is saved under its exact page in your configured notes workspace, without changing the original file.
reader.page_viewer: Lecture page viewer. Use left and right arrows to change pages.
reader.page_thumbnails: Page thumbnails. Scroll with the trackpad; use left and right arrows to change pages.
reader.reload_file_title: Retry this file without changing its page notes
reader.editor_placeholder: Capture the idea, question, or formula for this page… Type \ to suggest LaTeX symbols.
reader.render_failed: Could not render this page. Use Reload file to retry.
import.heading: Sort this lecture
import.title: Lecture title
import.note: The source is copied untouched. Notes are written separately inside your configured notes workspace.
import.ready: {title} is ready. Raw notes are linked in your notes workspace.
language.heading: Language
language.default_note: This also sets the default language for future polished notes.
language.active_note: This will update the selected lecture’s polished-note language.
language.no_active_note: No lecture is selected; this sets the default for future imports.
language.service_restart_required: Restart the local Margin service to change polished-note languages. Interface switching is still available.
language.confirm_body: The current polished note is in {language}. Choose whether to regenerate it in {next_language}.
language.note_pending: The polished note is marked for repolishing in {language}.
language.note_future: Future polished notes will use {language}; the current note was kept.
polish.checking_message: Margin is checking whether direct polishing is available.
polish.copy_description: Copies a complete hidden prompt that safely creates and finalizes the requested polished note.
polish.nightly_description: Copies a provider-neutral template asking your AI system to create a recurring nightly automation.
polish.footnote: Prompt contents stay hidden in Margin and are copied only when you press a copy button.
polish.ready_reason: Run Stage 2 here, or copy a hidden prompt for another AI system.
polish.unavailable: Direct manual polishing is unavailable. You may copy one of the prompts below into your AI automation to activate your own polishing system.
polish.no_runner: No direct AI runner is connected.
polish.prompt_not_ready: The prompt is not ready yet.
polish.copied: Prompt copied. Paste it into your AI or automation task.
polish.already_current: Already up to date — Stage 2 found no source or memo changes.
polish.running: Stage 2 is running. You can keep taking notes; changed inputs will be protected.
polish.pending_running: Polishing pending lectures one at a time. You can keep using Margin.
shortcuts.heading: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.pages: Move between lecture pages when the memo editor is not focused.
shortcuts.save: Save the memo assigned to the current page.
shortcuts.symbols: Show LaTeX symbol suggestions while writing a memo.
toast.file_reloaded: File reloaded. Page notes stayed assigned.
toast.reload_save_failed: The file was not reloaded because the current page memo could not be saved.
toast.file_type: Choose a PDF or PPTX file.
toast.stage_two_failed: Stage 2 finished without installing a current polished note.
